capabilities.reason: v3.10 implements deterministic local routing and status/trace contracts only; it does not copy external runtime code or prompts.
capabilities.what_to_absorb: Explicit runtime status, deterministic routing, and local-only execution boundaries.
capabilities.what_not_to_copy: Autonomous long-running agent loops, external tool execution, cloud memory services, or external prompts.
capabilities.optional_llm_assist_path: Reserved for future versions; v3.10 tests do not call providers.
capabilities.offline_fallback: Runtime uses package artifacts and local routing without network.
capabilities.contract_impact: Core emits local runtime status and memory/KB boundary fields for Workbench consumption.
capabilities.ui_impact: UI can display runtime status but no UI implementation is included.

capabilities.reason: The safe pattern is least-privilege KB access by declared binding; external runtime behavior is not copied.
capabilities.what_to_absorb: Explicit parent/child role boundaries and per-child KB allowlists.
capabilities.what_not_to_copy: Hidden memory sharing, automatic cross-KB expansion, or cloud-hosted agent state.
capabilities.local_deterministic_implementation: Agent profiles bind to package manifest package_id and runtime blocks unauthorized KB access.
capabilities.optional_llm_assist_path: Reserved; routing remains deterministic in v3.10.
capabilities.offline_fallback: Unauthorized KB requests are blocked locally before any provider could be used.
capabilities.contract_impact: Workbench contracts expose child agent bindings and KB access status.
capabilities.ui_impact: No UI changes in this audit pass.

capabilities.reason: v3.10 keeps memory isolation and writeback as contracts/reports; it does not build a real long-term memory database.
capabilities.what_to_absorb: Private-by-default child memory, explicit shared workflow memory, and selective parent writeback records.
capabilities.what_not_to_copy: Append-only all-history injection, hidden shared memory, or external hosted memory.
capabilities.local_deterministic_implementation: Memory reports and runtime trace fields enforce private/default and explicit shared modes.
capabilities.optional_llm_assist_path: Reserved for summarization in future versions; not used in tests.
capabilities.offline_fallback: Memory candidate and isolation reports are generated locally.
capabilities.contract_impact: Core contracts expose memory policy and writeback status.
capabilities.ui_impact: No UI changes in this audit pass.
